payload.answer: I could not remember takeaways from the article because the fetch failed with a 404/network error. No durable memory was committed from the unavailable source.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no source claims or takeaways can be extracted without inventing information.

details: No article content was available to extract claims.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Ask to remember only the URL and your stated reason, without article-derived claims.
